'''Meela''' was the daughter of a local professor on [[Jandoon]] by the name of [[Oron]]. She was captured and handed back by [[Durrei]], along with 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to [[Crime lord/Legends|crimelord]] [[Mahk'khar]], in exchange for the [[Kashi Mer talisman]].

{{Char-stub}}
